title: Netherracked
description: a Mod/Datapack that Adds Recipe for Netherrack in Minecraft (+ Create Mod)
body:
ANNOUNCEMENT
MCR is HERE! MCR is a tool to help players and server maintainers
to setup their instances and servers faster and easier.

![Netherracked Logo"](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IranMine123/netherracked/5565d415b167538873ee5e2e9982b8c94555db03/resources/Netherracked_Logo_FIT.png)
70k Downloads TYSM!

**Netherracked: A Datapack that Adds Recipe for Netherrack Which needs
Minecraft Furnace or Fan Blasting from Create Mod.** So, no more you upset because of "Can't Farm Netherrack". especially if you want to make Create Mod Blaze Burners have a *fully-automatic* source of **Blaze Cakes.**
### Here is how it works: **1. Minecraft Furnaces (Vanilla):** Simply add Blackstone to input and wait for it smelt and finally you get **Netherrack!** *(Hardly, it's difficult to farm Blackstone, sorry but I didn't find any respective Block for that.)* ![Netherrack Recipe for Furnace](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IranMine123/netherracked/5565d415b167538873ee5e2e9982b8c94555db03/resources/Screenshot%202023-05-08%20171453.png) **2. Create Mod Fan-Blasting:** throw Blackstone in front of fan and lava so after a time it turns into **Netherrack!** ![Netherrack Recipe for Fan Blasting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IranMine123/netherracked/5565d415b167538873ee5e2e9982b8c94555db03/resources/Screenshot%202023-05-08%20171825.png)
![Netherrack Recipe Explaining](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IranMine123/netherracked/5565d415b167538873ee5e2e9982b8c94555db03/resources/Netherracked_explain.png)
### How to Install? (Datapack) - put datapack into `.minecraft/saves/(YOUR_WORLD)/datapacks` - go to your world and type: `/datapack enable "file/Netherracked.zip"` - do `/reload` so datapack gets loaded into the world. doing this process once for every world is enough. so once you load it, it's done. but for adding to the other worlds, you should repeat this process. ### How to Install? (Mod) - just put the mod on the `.minecraft/mods` folder and you're done!
**"Netherracked" by IranMine123** **Please Credit our Modrinth Page** Website: [Arman Studios](https://armanstudios.ir)
